title: miliusa baillonii
intro: Miliusa baillonii, also known as the Himalayan snake root, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Miliusa baillonii typically include its root extracts, which can be consumed in the form of tea or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
